description_long: This object is a four-door sedan with a classic, boxy silhouette and a gently sloping roofline. The body features smooth, continuous surfaces with subtle creases along the sides, and the windows are proportionally large, providing good visibility. The front end is slightly rounded, with a low-set hood and a broad bumper, while the rear is squared off with a short trunk. The wheels are simple and circular, integrated into slightly flared wheel arches. The exterior appears to be a single, uniform color with no visible trim or ornamentation. The overall design suggests a practical, everyday urban vehicle, likely constructed from metal and glass with some plastic components.
description: A boxy, four-door sedan with smooth surfaces, large windows, and simple circular wheels. The exterior is uniform in color and design, emphasizing practicality.
description_view_0: Front view shows a broad, low hood, wide bumper, and the front windshield with minimal detailing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four-door configuration, large windows, and the full profile of the wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a squared-off trunk, rear bumper, and the back window, with no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the four doors, large windows, and simple wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Simple, solid circular wheels with no visible spokes or distinctive features, color matches the body.
